name: Cheddar, Sage, and Walnut Torta
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cream cheese in a food processor with the chopped sage leaves.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Line a 2-cup mold with double thickness of cheesecloth.
4. Arrange whole sage leaves in decorative pattern on bottom of mold.
5. Add half the cream cheese mixture, then add shredded cheddar, smoothing layer and pressing slightly.
6. Add walnuts, pressing gently.
7. Smooth remaining cream cheese mixture over walnuts.
8. Fold ends of cheesecloth over top of torta mixture and press lightly.
9. Refrigerate mold overnight.
10. To unmold, fold back top of cheesecloth.
11. Invert serving plate on top of mold and flip together.
12. Lift off mold and carefully remove cheesecloth.
13. Garnish with walnut halves.
